blockedAssertions.blockedBy: No true AWQ model available. Model at /opt/models/Qwen3.5-27B-AWQ has zero_point=True in quantization_config (GPTQ-compatible format). All HuggingFace AWQ models surveyed in round 7 have zero_point=True. AutoAWQ not installed on dev server. E2E validation cannot be completed without a true AWQ model (zero_point=False, no qzeros tensors). C dispatch integration verified by code inspection and kernel loading tests.

VAL-AWQ-001.summary: AWQ dual kernel produces numerically correct output

VAL-AWQ-002.summary: AWQ dual kernel loads and engine correctly selects it when AWQ mode enabled

VAL-AWQ-003.summary: AWQ dual kernel shows 1.8-4.5% speedup over GPTQ dual kernel

VAL-AWQ-004.summary: C dispatch integration verified, E2E blocked by lack of true AWQ model

recommendations.description: Accept partial validation status for awq-dual milestone
recommendations.rationale: 3/4 assertions pass with high confidence. VAL-AWQ-004 E2E cannot be completed without a true AWQ model. All HuggingFace AWQ models surveyed have zero_point=True. C dispatch integration is verified by code inspection and kernel loading tests.

recommendations.description: Consider creating synthetic AWQ weights for E2E validation
recommendations.rationale: test_awq_loader.py creates synthetic AWQ safetensors with zero_point=False. Could extend this to create a full model for E2E testing, but would require significant test infrastructure work.

recommendations.description: Install AutoAWQ and quantize Qwen3.5-27B with zero_point=False
recommendations.rationale: Would provide true AWQ model for E2E validation, but requires installing AutoAWQ (not currently on dev server) and running quantization process (~hours on MI50).

huggingFaceSurvey.conclusion: No true AWQ model (zero_point=False) available on HuggingFace
